---
description: "Use when editing or discussing generated files like commands.gen.go, models.gen.go, or pr-schema.yaml. Prevents accidental manual edits to auto-generated code."
applyTo: ["internal/commands/commands.gen.go", "internal/generated/models.gen.go", "schema/pr-schema.yaml"]
---
# Generated Files — Do Not Edit

These files are auto-generated by the code generation pipeline:

| File | Generator |
|------|-----------|
| `internal/commands/commands.gen.go` | `go run scripts/gen_commands/main.go` |
| `internal/generated/models.gen.go` | `oapi-codegen --config oapi-codegen.yaml` |
| `schema/pr-schema.yaml` | `python3 scripts/partition_spec.py` |

**Never hand-edit these files.** Changes will be overwritten by the next CI run.

Instead, fix the issue at its source:
- **Wrong command flags/descriptions** → fix `scripts/gen_commands/main.go`
- **Wrong model types** → fix `oapi-codegen.yaml` config or `scripts/partition_spec.py`
- **Missing/wrong endpoints** → fix `scripts/enrich_spec.py` or `scripts/partition_spec.py`
- **Missing operationIds** → fix `scripts/enrich_spec.py`

After fixing the source, regenerate:
```bash
python3 scripts/enrich_spec.py <raw-spec.json> <enriched.json>
python3 scripts/partition_spec.py <enriched.json> schema/pr-schema.yaml
oapi-codegen --config oapi-codegen.yaml schema/pr-schema.yaml
go run scripts/gen_commands/main.go schema/pr-schema.yaml internal/commands/commands.gen.go
```
